dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The soft morning light filters through the blinds, painting stripes across the messy, beloved apartment.

dialogue.speaker: Goth
dialogue.line: (Thought) Another morning. Sometimes, even after all this time, it feels a little… overwhelming. Four people. Four very different lives, tangled up in one messy, beautiful knot.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Goth blinks, adjusting to the light. He feels a warm weight against his side.

dialogue.speaker: Jock
dialogue.line: (Muttering, half-asleep) Mmm, Gothy… five more minutes…

dialogue.speaker: Goth
dialogue.line: (Thought) That’s Jock. Always radiating warmth, even in his sleep. He’s like a human-sized golden retriever.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Across the room, perched on the edge of the sofa, is Nerd, already engrossed in a thick textbook, a half-empty mug of tea beside him.

dialogue.speaker: Goth
dialogue.line: (Thought) And there’s Nerd. Probably been up for hours, dissecting some obscure theory before the sun even thought about rising. How does he do it?

dialogue.speaker: Nerd
dialogue.line: Ah, good morning, Goth. Did you sleep well? I was just contemplating the implications of the latest findings in theoretical astrophysics.

dialogue.speaker: Goth
dialogue.line: Morning, Nerd. Sounds… intense.

dialogue.speaker: Jock
dialogue.line: (Stretching, yawning loudly) Morning, everyone! *YAWN* Time to conquer the day!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: STRETCH! YAWN!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Jock springs up, full of energy, already doing a few quick stretches.

dialogue.speaker: Prep
dialogue.line: (From the kitchen) Jock, don't forget to wipe down the counter after your protein shake. And Nerd, please try not to spill coffee on your textbook again. That was a nightmare to clean.

dialogue.speaker: Goth
dialogue.line: (Thought) And that, of course, is Prep. The anchor. The one who keeps us all from spiraling into utter chaos. He’s the reason we have matching socks and a semblance of a schedule.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLINK CLATTER (of dishes)

dialogue.speaker: Jock
dialogue.line: Got it, Prep! Hey, Gothy, wanna go for a run later? Or maybe hit the gym? Gotta keep those muscles toned!

dialogue.speaker: Goth
dialogue.line: A run? Jock, it’s barely 8 AM. My preferred morning activity involves a dark room and minimal human interaction.

dialogue.speaker: Nerd
dialogue.line: Statistically, early morning exercise can significantly improve cognitive function, Jock. However, Goth's preference for a calm environment is also valid for mental well-being.

dialogue.speaker: Prep
dialogue.line: (Entering the living room, holding a tray with mugs) Breakfast is ready. Scrambled eggs and toast. Jock, your protein shake is by your plate. Nerd, I made you green tea.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: HUM (of the coffee maker)

dialogue.speaker: Jock
dialogue.line: You're the best, Prep! *SMOOCH*

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Jock plants a quick kiss on Prep’s cheek, making Prep roll his eyes good-naturedly.

dialogue.speaker: Prep
dialogue.line: Don't get grease on my shirt. Goth, your coffee is black, as usual.

dialogue.speaker: Goth
dialogue.line: Thanks, Prep. You always know.

dialogue.speaker: Goth
dialogue.line: (Thought) He always knows. They all do, in their own ways. Jock knows how to pull me out of my head with a spontaneous hug. Nerd knows when I need quiet companionship. And Prep… Prep just knows how to make everything work.

dialogue.speaker: Jock
dialogue.line: So, what's on the agenda for today, lovebirds? Movie marathon? Board games? Or maybe we try that new escape room?

dialogue.speaker: Nerd
dialogue.line: I have a few chapters to review for my thesis, but I could allocate an hour for a recreational activity.

dialogue.speaker: Prep
dialogue.line: I have to run errands and organize the weekly budget. But we could do something together this evening. Maybe order takeout?

dialogue.speaker: Goth
dialogue.line: (Thought) See? It’s never simple. Four different schedules, four different preferences. It could be a disaster.

dialogue.speaker: Jock
dialogue.line: Takeout sounds great! And then a movie? We could all cuddle on the couch!

dialogue.speaker: Nerd
dialogue.line: That sounds agreeable. Perhaps a documentary on the cosmos?

dialogue.speaker: Prep
dialogue.line: As long as it's not another one of Jock's action movies. My ears can only take so much simulated gunfire.

dialogue.speaker: Jock
dialogue.line: Hey! Action movies are fun! But okay, okay, cosmos it is. As long as Goth gets to pick the food!

dialogue.speaker: Goth
dialogue.line: (A small smile) Deal. I'm thinking… spicy noodles.

dialogue.speaker: Goth
dialogue.line: (Thought) And just like that, it works. It always does. It’s chaotic, a little overwhelming, and sometimes I wonder how we manage. But then I look at them, these three incredible, infuriating, loving men… and I wouldn't have it any other way.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CHUCKLE (from Prep)

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GIGGLE (from Jock)

summary: Goth wakes up to a typical morning with his three boyfriends, Jock, Nerd, and Prep, observing their contrasting personalities and routines as they navigate breakfast and plans for the day, ultimately finding a sweet compromise.
